pictures.title: 考古学诞生
pictures.summary: 十九世纪中叶，考古学从古物学中脱胎而出。谢里曼在特洛伊遗址的...
pictures.full_text: 十九世纪中叶，考古学从古物学中脱胎而出。谢里曼在特洛伊遗址的发掘证实了荷马史诗的真实性，皮特里在埃及创立了地层学方法，科学的考古学由此诞生，人类开始用严谨的方法解读大地之书。
pictures.full_text_en: In the mid-19th century, archaeology emerged from antiquarianism. Schliemann's excavations at Troy confirmed the historicity of Homer's epics, Petrie established stratigraphic methods in Egypt, and scientific archaeology was born. Humanity began reading the book of the earth with rigorous methods.

pictures.title: 殷墟发掘
pictures.summary: 一九二八年中央研究院历史语言研究所开始发掘安阳殷墟，这是中国...
pictures.full_text: 一九二八年中央研究院历史语言研究所开始发掘安阳殷墟，这是中国首次科学考古发掘。董作宾、李济等学者在洹水南岸出土了大量甲骨文和青铜器，商代文明从传说变为信史。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1928, the Institute of History and Philology of the Academia Sinica began excavating the Yin Ruins in Anyang, marking China's first scientific archaeological excavation. Scholars including Dong Zuobin and Li Ji unearthed large quantities of oracle bone inscriptions and bronze vessels on the south bank of the Huan River, transforming Shang Dynasty civilization from legend into documented history.

pictures.title: 秦始皇陵探查
pictures.summary: 一九七四年临潼农民打井时发现兵马俑，震惊世界。铜车马、石铠甲...
pictures.full_text: 一九七四年临潼农民打井时发现兵马俑，震惊世界。铜车马、石铠甲、水禽坑相继出土，地宫中水银模拟江河大海的传说尚未证实。秦始皇帝陵院的考古工作仍在持续，更多秘密等待揭开。
pictures.title_en: Exploration of Qin Shi Huang's Mausoleum
pictures.full_text_en: In 1974, farmers in Lintong drilling a well discovered the Terracotta Army, shocking the world. Bronze chariots, stone armor, and water bird pits were successively unearthed, while the legend of mercury simulating rivers and seas in the underground palace remains unverified. Archaeological work at Qin Shi Huang's mausoleum complex continues, with more secrets awaiting discovery.

pictures.title: 三星堆发掘
pictures.summary: 四川广汉三星堆出土的青铜纵目面具和金杖颠覆了人们对古蜀文明的...
pictures.full_text: 四川广汉三星堆出土的青铜纵目面具和金杖颠覆了人们对古蜀文明的认知。高达三米的青铜神树、奇异的青铜人头像，这些前所未见的文物表明古蜀文明有着独立于中原的独特文化体系。
pictures.full_text_en: The bronze protruding-eye masks and gold staff unearthed at Sanxingdui in Guanghan, Sichuan, overturned people's understanding of ancient Shu civilization. The three-meter-tall bronze sacred tree and bizarre bronze human head sculptures—these unprecedented artifacts indicate that ancient Shu civilization had a unique cultural system independent of the Central Plains.

pictures.title: 马王堆汉墓
pictures.summary: 长沙马王堆汉墓出土了两千一百年前保存完好的女尸辛追夫人，皮肤...
pictures.full_text: 长沙马王堆汉墓出土了两千一百年前保存完好的女尸辛追夫人，皮肤仍有弹性。素纱禅衣仅重四十九克，帛画T形旌幡色彩鲜艳，竹简医书内容丰富，这是二十世纪最惊人的考古发现之一。
pictures.full_text_en: The Mawangdui Han Tombs in Changsha yielded the well-preserved 2,100-year-old body of Lady Xin Zhui, whose skin still retained elasticity. The plain gauze robe weighed only 49 grams, the T-shaped silk banner retained vibrant colors, and bamboo medical slips contained rich content. This is one of the most astonishing archaeological discoveries of the 20th century.

pictures.title: 曾侯乙墓
pictures.summary: 湖北随州曾侯乙墓出土的编钟共六十五件，总重二千五百公斤，音域...
pictures.full_text: 湖北随州曾侯乙墓出土的编钟共六十五件，总重二千五百公斤，音域跨五个半八度。青铜尊盘采用失蜡法铸造，工艺精湛绝伦。这座战国早期墓葬揭示了曾国的辉煌文明和先秦礼乐制度。
pictures.title_en: Tomb of Marquis Yi of Zeng
pictures.full_text_en: The tomb of Marquis Yi of Zeng in Suizhou, Hubei, yielded a set of 65 bronze bells weighing 2,500 kg in total, with a tonal range spanning five and a half octaves. The bronze zun-pan vessel was cast using the lost-wax method with exquisite craftsmanship. This early Warring States tomb reveals the splendid civilization of the Zeng state and the pre-Qin ritual and musical system.

pictures.title: 良渚古城发掘
pictures.summary: 浙江良渚古城遗址的发掘证实了五千年中华文明的存在。水利系统规...
pictures.full_text: 浙江良渚古城遗址的发掘证实了五千年中华文明的存在。水利系统规模宏大，玉琮玉璧制作精美，莫角山宫殿基址面积达三十万平方米。二〇一九年良渚列入世界遗产名录，中华五千年文明有了实证。
pictures.full_text_en: The excavation of the Liangzhu ancient city site in Zhejiang confirmed the existence of 5,000 years of Chinese civilization. The water conservancy system is grand in scale, jade cong and bi are exquisitely crafted, and the Mojiaoshan palace foundation covers 300,000 square meters. In 2019, Liangzhu was inscribed on the World Heritage List, providing concrete evidence of 5,000 years of Chinese civilization.

pictures.title: 二里头遗址
pictures.summary: 河南偃师二里头遗址被认为是夏朝晚期都城。宫殿基址的发现表明这...
pictures.full_text: 河南偃师二里头遗址被认为是夏朝晚期都城。宫殿基址的发现表明这里已有成熟的国家形态，绿松石龙形器精美绝伦，铜牌饰上的兽面纹可能是商周饕餮纹的源头。夏文化的探索仍在继续。
pictures.full_text_en: The excavation of the Yangshao Village site in Mianchi, Henan, marked the birth of modern Chinese archaeology. The human-face and fish designs on painted pottery basins are enigmatic. Excavations at Banpo and Miaodigou revealed farming settlements from 6,000 years ago in the middle reaches of the Yellow River, and the evolution of painted pottery motifs from fish to floral patterns reflects changes in prehistoric aesthetics.

pictures.title: 海昏侯墓
pictures.summary: 江西南昌海昏侯刘贺墓出土文物一万余件，黄金器物数量惊人。马蹄...
pictures.full_text: 江西南昌海昏侯刘贺墓出土文物一万余件，黄金器物数量惊人。马蹄金、麟趾金金光闪耀，竹简论语和齐论语的发现填补了文献空白，蒸馏器的出土将中国蒸馏技术的历史大幅提前。
pictures.full_text_en: The tomb of Liu He, Marquis of Haihun, in Nanchang, Jiangxi, yielded over 10,000 artifacts, with an astonishing quantity of gold objects. Horseshoe gold and qilin-toe gold gleam brilliantly, the discovery of bamboo slip versions of the Analerta and Qi Analerta filled gaps in textual records, and the unearthed distillation apparatus significantly pushed back the history of Chinese distillation technology.

pictures.title: 石峁遗址
pictures.summary: 陕西石峁古城距今四千余年，城墙用石块砌筑，面积达四百万平方米...
pictures.full_text: 陕西石峁古城距今四千余年，城墙用石块砌筑，面积达四百万平方米。城墙上镶嵌着精美的石雕人面像，玉器被插入墙体作为宗教仪式。这座超大型史前城址改写了对早期国家形成的认知。
pictures.full_text_en: The Shimao ancient city in Shaanxi dates back over 4,000 years, with stone-block walls enclosing an area of four million square meters. Exquisite stone-carved human faces are embedded in the city walls, and jade objects were inserted into the walls as part of religious rituals. This super-large prehistoric city site has rewritten our understanding of early state formation.

pictures.title: 陶寺遗址
pictures.summary: 山西襄汾陶寺遗址发现了中国最早的天文观象台，古人通过观测日出...
pictures.full_text: 山西襄汾陶寺遗址发现了中国最早的天文观象台，古人通过观测日出方位确定节气。彩绘龙盘上的蟠龙纹可能是中国龙形象的源头，铜铃和朱书文字的发现将中国文字史向前推进。
pictures.full_text_en: The Taosi site in Xiangfen, Shanxi, revealed China's earliest astronomical observatory, where ancient people determined solar terms by observing sunrise positions. The coiled dragon motif on painted dragon plates may be the origin of the Chinese dragon image, and the discovery of copper bells and vermilion-inscribed characters pushes forward the history of Chinese writing.

pictures.title: 图坦卡蒙墓
pictures.summary: 一九二二年卡特在帝王谷发现了图坦卡蒙墓，黄金面具和石棺震惊世...
pictures.full_text: 一九二二年卡特在帝王谷发现了图坦卡蒙墓，黄金面具和石棺震惊世界。墓室中数千件随葬品保存完好，法老的木乃伊和内脏罐揭示了古埃及的丧葬习俗，这是最完整的古埃及皇家墓葬。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1922, Carter discovered the tomb of Tutankhamun in the Valley of the Kings, with its golden mask and sarcophagus shocking the world. Thousands of burial goods in the tomb chamber were perfectly preserved, and the pharaoh's mummy and canopic jars revealed ancient Egyptian funerary customs. This is the most complete ancient Egyptian royal burial.

pictures.title: 特洛伊遗址
pictures.summary: 谢里曼在希沙利克山丘发掘出九层城市遗址，特洛伊战争从神话变为...
pictures.full_text: 谢里曼在希沙利克山丘发掘出九层城市遗址，特洛伊战争从神话变为历史。普里阿姆宝藏中的金冠和首饰精美绝伦，尽管地层判断有误，但这一发现开创了用考古学验证文献传说的先河。
pictures.full_text_en: Schliemann excavated nine layers of city remains at Hisarlik Hill, transforming the Trojan War from myth into history. The gold crowns and jewelry in Priam's Treasure were exquisite, and though his stratigraphic judgments were flawed, this discovery pioneered the use of archaeology to verify literary traditions.

pictures.title: 死海古卷
pictures.summary: 一九四七年贝都因牧羊人在库姆兰洞穴中发现了死海古卷，这是现存...
pictures.full_text: 一九四七年贝都因牧羊人在库姆兰洞穴中发现了死海古卷，这是现存最古老的希伯来圣经抄本。羊皮卷和莎草纸卷记录了两千年前的宗教文献，对研究犹太教和基督教起源具有不可估量的价值。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1947, Bedouin shepherds discovered the Dead Sea Scrolls in the Qumran caves—the oldest surviving Hebrew biblical manuscripts. The parchment and papyrus scrolls record religious texts from 2,000 years ago, with immeasurable value for studying the origins of Judaism and Christianity.

pictures.title: 罗塞塔石碑
pictures.summary: 一七九九年拿破仑远征埃及期间发现了罗塞塔石碑，上面刻有三种文...
pictures.full_text: 一七九九年拿破仑远征埃及期间发现了罗塞塔石碑，上面刻有三种文字的同一诏书。商博良据此破译了古埃及象形文字，沉默了千年的法老文明终于开口说话，埃及学由此诞生。
pictures.full_text_en: During Napoleon's Egyptian campaign in 1799, the Rosetta Stone was discovered, bearing the same decree in three scripts. Champollion used it to decipher ancient Egyptian hieroglyphics, and the pharaonic civilization silent for millennia finally spoke. Egyptology was thus born.

pictures.title: 碳十四测年法
pictures.summary: 一九四九年利比发明碳十四测年法，利用有机物中碳十四的衰变测定...
pictures.full_text: 一九四九年利比发明碳十四测年法，利用有机物中碳十四的衰变测定年代。这一方法将考古学从相对年代推进到绝对年代，误差可控制在数十年内，利比因此获得诺贝尔化学奖。
pictures.full_text_en: The caves at Zhoukoudian's Dragon Bone Hill yielded Peking Man's skull fossils and fire-use remains, pushing human history back 500,000 years. Stone tools and ash layers proved that Peking Man had mastered fire technology. Sadly, the skull fossils were lost during World War II and remain missing to this day.

pictures.title: 水下考古
pictures.summary: 南海一号宋代沉船整体打捞开创了水下考古的新纪元。这艘满载瓷器...
pictures.full_text: 南海一号宋代沉船整体打捞开创了水下考古的新纪元。这艘满载瓷器和金银的商船在海底沉睡八百年，船体和货物保存完好。水下考古学让沉默在深海中的历史重新浮出水面。
pictures.full_text_en: The Erlitou site in Yanshi, Henan, is believed to be the late capital of the Xia Dynasty. The discovery of palace foundations indicates a mature state structure existed here. The turquoise dragon-shaped artifact is exquisitely crafted, and the animal mask motifs on bronze plaques may be the origin of Shang and Zhou taotie designs. The exploration of Xia culture continues.

pictures.title: 周口店北京人遗址
pictures.summary: 周口店龙骨山的洞穴中出土了北京猿人的头盖骨化石与用火遗迹，将...
pictures.full_text: 周口店龙骨山的洞穴中出土了北京猿人的头盖骨化石与用火遗迹，将人类历史推至五十万年前。石器与灰烬层证明北京人已掌握用火技术，可惜头骨化石在二战中遗失，至今下落不明。
pictures.title_en: Tomb of Lady Fu Hao at Yin Ruins
pictures.full_text_en: The tomb of Lady Fu Hao at the Yin Ruins in Anyang is the only undisturbed Shang Dynasty royal tomb. The tomb owner was Fu Hao, queen of King Wu Ding of Shang. Over 400 bronze vessels and 700 jade objects were unearthed. Fu Hao was both queen and female general commanding armies, with multiple oracle bone records of her leading military campaigns.

pictures.title: 河姆渡遗址
pictures.summary: 浙江河姆渡遗址出土了七千年前的稻谷遗存与干栏式建筑，证明长江...
pictures.full_text: 浙江河姆渡遗址出土了七千年前的稻谷遗存与干栏式建筑，证明长江流域是稻作农业的独立起源地。骨耜与漆碗工艺精湛，陶猪与陶羊反映了家畜饲养，河姆渡改写了对中华文明起源的认知。
pictures.title_en: Tomb of the Duke of Qin
pictures.full_text_en: The tomb of the Duke of Qin in Fengxiang, Shaanxi, is the largest pre-Qin tomb ever excavated, with a chamber area exceeding 5,000 square meters. Despite repeated looting, gold vessels and stone chimes were still recovered. Inscriptions identify the tomb owner as Duke Jing of Qin, and the tomb's scale demonstrates Qin's rise from a small western state to a dominant power.

pictures.title: 殷墟妇好墓
pictures.summary: 安阳殷墟妇好墓是唯一未被盗掘的商代王室墓葬，墓主是商王武丁的...
pictures.full_text: 安阳殷墟妇好墓是唯一未被盗掘的商代王室墓葬，墓主是商王武丁的王后妇好。出土青铜器四百余件、玉器七百余件，妇好既是王后也是统帅军队的女将军，甲骨文中多次记载她率军出征。
pictures.full_text_en: The Tang Dynasty underground palace of Famen Temple in Shaanxi yielded the Buddha's finger bone relic and numerous imperial treasures. The gold, silver, and mise ceramics represent the pinnacle of craftsmanship. Sealed in 874 AD, the artifacts were preserved in pristine condition, providing invaluable resources for studying Tang court Buddhism and craft technology.

pictures.title: 周原遗址
pictures.summary: 陕西周原是西周王朝的发祥地，出土了大量青铜器与甲骨文。窖藏青...
pictures.full_text: 陕西周原是西周王朝的发祥地，出土了大量青铜器与甲骨文。窖藏青铜器铭文记录着西周的册命与赏赐，甲骨卜辞揭示了周人的祭祀制度，周原考古为理解西周礼乐文明提供了丰富的实物证据。
pictures.full_text_en: The underground palace of Leifeng Pagoda in Hangzhou yielded the Buddha's ushnisha hair relic enshrined by Qian Chu, King of Wuyue, and an Ashoka Pagoda. Inside the gilded silver pagoda rested a gold coffin and silver outer coffin. Leifeng Pagoda is famous for the Legend of the White Snake, and the underground palace archaeology allows artifacts and legends to illuminate each other, offering a glimpse of Five Dynasties Buddhist culture.

pictures.title: 西汉南越王墓
pictures.summary: 广州象岗山南越王墓出土了丝缕玉衣与金印，墓主为第二代南越王赵...
pictures.full_text: 广州象岗山南越王墓出土了丝缕玉衣与金印，墓主为第二代南越王赵眜。银盒与象牙制品来自海外，证明南越国已与东南亚有贸易往来，岭南地区的汉代考古因这座王墓而面貌一新。
pictures.full_text_en: The Jinsha site in Chengdu yielded the Sun and Immortal Bird gold ornament and large quantities of ivory, representing another major discovery of ancient Shu civilization after Sanxingdui. Gold masks and bronze figures share a stylistic lineage with Sanxingdui, and Jinsha may have been the new capital of the ancient Shu kingdom after Sanxingdui's decline.

pictures.title: 明定陵发掘
pictures.summary: 一九五六年考古工作者发掘了明神宗定陵，出土了金冠与龙袍等珍贵...
pictures.full_text: 一九五六年考古工作者发掘了明神宗定陵，出土了金冠与龙袍等珍贵文物。但丝织品与木器出土后迅速氧化损毁，这次教训促使此后不再主动发掘帝王陵墓，保护优先成为考古界的共识。
pictures.full_text_en: The Jiahu site in Wuyang, Henan, yielded 9,000-year-old bone flutes made from crane bones capable of playing a seven-note scale. Incised symbols on turtle shells may be the remote ancestors of Chinese characters, and carbonized rice and dog burial pits reveal early agriculture and animal domestication. Jiahu is the dawn before the sunrise of Chinese civilization.

pictures.title: 金沙遗址
pictures.summary: 成都金沙遗址出土了太阳神鸟金饰与大量象牙，是继三星堆之后古蜀...
pictures.full_text: 成都金沙遗址出土了太阳神鸟金饰与大量象牙，是继三星堆之后古蜀文明的又一重大发现。金面具与铜人像风格与三星堆一脉相承，金沙可能是三星堆衰落之后古蜀国的新都城。
pictures.full_text_en: The Lajia site in Qinghai preserves a 4,000-year-old disaster scene, with a mother clutching her child in a heart-wrenching pose. Earthquakes and floods instantly destroyed this Qijia Culture village. The discovery of fossilized noodles pushes the history of Chinese pasta back 4,000 years. Lajia is the Pompeii of the East.

pictures.title: 牛河梁遗址
pictures.summary: 辽宁牛河梁红山文化遗址发现了女神庙与积石冢群，出土的泥塑女神...
pictures.full_text: 辽宁牛河梁红山文化遗址发现了女神庙与积石冢群，出土的泥塑女神像与玉猪龙震惊学界。祭坛与墓葬的规模表明五千年前这里已存在复杂的宗教体系与社会分层，中华文明起源的多元性由此证实。
pictures.full_text_en: The Laoguanshan Han tombs in Chengdu yielded a lacquered human figure with meridian points and over 900 medical bamboo slips, recording long-lost texts of the Bianque medical school. Loom models revealed the structure of Han Dynasty jacquard looms. The Laoguanshan discoveries brought revolutionary breakthroughs to the study of Chinese medicine and textile history.

pictures.title: 凌家滩遗址
pictures.summary: 安徽含山凌家滩遗址出土了五千三百年前的玉龟与玉版，玉版上的八...
pictures.full_text: 安徽含山凌家滩遗址出土了五千三百年前的玉龟与玉版，玉版上的八角星纹可能是原始八卦的雏形。玉人姿态虔诚，玉鹰展翅欲飞，凌家滩的玉器工艺领先同时期其他文化，是史前文明交流的枢纽。
pictures.full_text_en: The Jiangkou sunken silver site in Pengshan, Sichuan, recovered large quantities of gold and silver vessels and the gold seal of the Prince of Shu, confirming the legend of Zhang Xianzhong's sunken silver. Archaeologists used cofferdam excavation to reveal a battlefield site in the river channel. Gold and silver documents and silver ingot inscriptions record the extravagance of late Ming feudal lords and the cruelty of war.

pictures.title: 老官山汉墓
pictures.summary: 成都老官山汉墓出土了人体经穴髹漆人与九百馀支医简，记载了失传...
pictures.full_text: 成都老官山汉墓出土了人体经穴髹漆人与九百馀支医简，记载了失传已久的扁鹊医派典籍。织机模型揭示了汉代提花织机的结构，老官山的发现为中医学与纺织史研究带来了革命性突破。
pictures.title_en: Tomb of Princess Chen of the Liao Dynasty
pictures.full_text_en: The tomb of Princess Chen in Inner Mongolia yielded complete Khitan noble burial furnishings, with a gold mask and silver wire mesh covering the entire body. Amber necklaces and glass cups came from Silk Road trade, and the princess and her husband were buried together in solemn dignity. The luxurious life and funerary customs of Liao Dynasty nobility are thus revealed in full.

pictures.title: 江口沉银
pictures.summary: 四川彭山江口沉银遗址出水了大量金银器与蜀王金宝，证实了张献忠...
pictures.full_text: 四川彭山江口沉银遗址出水了大量金银器与蜀王金宝，证实了张献忠沉银的传说。考古工作者用围堰发掘法在河道中揭露了战场遗址，金银册与银锭铭文记录着明末藩王的奢华与战乱的残酷。
pictures.full_text_en: The complete salvage of the Song Dynasty shipwreck Nanhai One pioneered a new era in underwater archaeology, using a steel caisson to lift the entire ship along with its seabed sediment. The vessel contained 80,000 porcelain pieces, with gold and lacquerware well preserved. This Fujian-type ship is a physical specimen of the Maritime Silk Road.

pictures.title: 上林湖越窑
pictures.summary: 浙江上林湖越窑遗址是唐五代秘色瓷的产地，窑址遍布湖岸。考古发...
pictures.full_text: 浙江上林湖越窑遗址是唐五代秘色瓷的产地，窑址遍布湖岸。考古发掘揭示了从早期青瓷到秘色瓷的技术演进，窑工用瓷质匣钵密封烧制出如冰似玉的秘色瓷，唐诗中的千峰翠色终获实证。
pictures.title_en: Bronze Chariots of Qin Shi Huang's Mausoleum
pictures.full_text_en: The two bronze chariots unearthed from Qin Shi Huang's mausoleum were cast at half scale with breathtaking craftsmanship. The bronze horses have fluid muscle lines, the charioteer figures wear respectful expressions, and the umbrella and carriage mechanisms remain functional. The bronze chariots represent the highest achievement of Qin Dynasty metallurgy and casting technology.

pictures.title: 秦始皇陵铜车马
pictures.summary: 秦始皇陵出土的两乘铜车马按二分之一比例铸造，工艺精湛令人叹为...
pictures.full_text: 秦始皇陵出土的两乘铜车马按二分之一比例铸造，工艺精湛令人叹为观止。铜马肌肉线条流畅，御官俑神态恭谨，伞盖与车厢的机关灵活可动，铜车马是秦代冶金与铸造技术的最高代表。
pictures.full_text_en: The Taosi site in Xiangfen, Shanxi, revealed a 4,100-year-old observatory with 13 rammed-earth pillars forming semi-circular gaps. Ancient people determined 20 solar terms by observing sunrise positions through the gaps, 500 years earlier than Stonehenge in England. The Taosi Observatory is the earliest known astronomical observation facility in the world.

pictures.title: 乌尔王室墓
pictures.summary: 伊拉克乌尔城出土的王室墓葬中，侍从与乐师随主人殉葬，金头盔与...
pictures.full_text: 伊拉克乌尔城出土的王室墓葬中，侍从与乐师随主人殉葬，金头盔与里拉琴工艺精湛。乌尔军旗两面分别描绘战争与宴饮场景，苏美尔文明的社会等级与宗教信仰在墓葬中清晰呈现。
pictures.full_text_en: Pits 1 through 8 at Sanxingdui yielded world-stunning artifacts including bronze altars and gold masks, with ivory and seashells layered as offerings to the gods. Objects in the pits were deliberately broken, burned, and buried in layers, representing the remains of grand sacrificial ceremonies by the ancient Shu people, revealing the unique sacrificial traditions of ancient Shu civilization.

pictures.title: 摩亨佐-达罗
pictures.summary: 巴基斯坦摩亨佐-达罗是印度河文明最大的城市遗址，街道呈棋盘式...
pictures.full_text: 巴基斯坦摩亨佐-达罗是印度河文明最大的城市遗址，街道呈棋盘式布局排水系统精巧。大浴池可能是宗教净礼场所，印章文字至今未被破译，这座四千年前的城市规划令现代工程师叹服。
pictures.full_text_en: In the royal tombs unearthed at Ur in Iraq, attendants and musicians were buried with their masters, and gold helmets and lyres show exquisite craftsmanship. The Standard of Ur depicts war scenes on one side and banquet scenes on the other. Sumerian civilization's social hierarchy and religious beliefs are clearly presented in these burials.

pictures.title: 克诺索斯宫殿
pictures.summary: 克里特岛克诺索斯宫殿是米诺斯文明的政治与宗教中心，迷宫般的房...
pictures.full_text: 克里特岛克诺索斯宫殿是米诺斯文明的政治与宗教中心，迷宫般的房间层层相连。壁画上跳跃的公牛与优雅的持蛇女神色彩鲜艳，排水系统比罗马早千年，米诺斯是欧洲最早的高度文明。
pictures.full_text_en: Mohenjo-daro in Pakistan is the largest city site of the Indus Valley Civilization, with chessboard-pattern streets and an ingenious drainage system. The Great Bath may have been a ritual purification site, and the script on seals remains undeciphered. The urban planning of this 4,000-year-old city impresses even modern engineers.

pictures.title: 迈锡尼墓葬
pictures.summary: 希腊迈锡尼的竖井墓中出土了金面具与金杯，阿伽门农金面具虽名不...
pictures.full_text: 希腊迈锡尼的竖井墓中出土了金面具与金杯，阿伽门农金面具虽名不副实却震惊世界。蜂巢墓的叠涩穹顶技术精湛，线性文字B记录着宫廷库存，迈锡尼文明是荷马史诗的历史背景。
pictures.full_text_en: The Palace of Knossos on Crete was the political and religious center of Minoan civilization, with labyrinthine rooms connected layer upon layer. Frescoes depicting leaping bulls and elegant snake goddesses retain vibrant colors, and the drainage system predates Rome by a millennium. Minoan was Europe's earliest advanced civilization.

pictures.title: 赫梯首都哈图沙
pictures.summary: 土耳其哈图沙遗址是赫梯帝国的首都，城墙上的狮子门与狮身人面门...
pictures.full_text: 土耳其哈图沙遗址是赫梯帝国的首都，城墙上的狮子门与狮身人面门气势恢宏。出土的楔形文字泥板记录了赫梯法律与外交条约，卡迭石和约的赫梯版本在此发现，赫梯文明从遗忘中重见天日。
pictures.full_text_en: Shaft graves at Mycenae in Greece yielded gold masks and cups. The Mask of Agamemnon, though misattributed, shocked the world. Beehive tombs demonstrate sophisticated corbelled vault techniques, and Linear B records document palace inventories. Mycenaean civilization is the historical backdrop of Homer's epics.

pictures.title: 亚述尼尼微
pictures.summary: 伊拉克尼尼微遗址出土了亚述巴尼拔图书馆的两万余块泥板，涵盖文...
pictures.full_text: 伊拉克尼尼微遗址出土了亚述巴尼拔图书馆的两万余块泥板，涵盖文学、医学与占星学。猎狮浮雕栩栩如生，拉玛苏人面牛身像守卫着宫殿大门，亚述帝国的残酷与文明在考古发现中并存。
pictures.full_text_en: The Hattusa site in Turkey was the capital of the Hittite Empire, with the Lion Gate and Sphinx Gate on the city walls imposing and majestic. Unearthed cuneiform tablets record Hittite laws and diplomatic treaties, and the Hittite version of the Treaty of Kadesh was discovered here. Hittite civilization re-emerged from oblivion.

pictures.title: 波斯波利斯
pictures.summary: 伊朗波斯波利斯宫殿遗址的觐见阶梯上，二十个属国的使节浮雕栩栩...
pictures.full_text: 伊朗波斯波利斯宫殿遗址的觐见阶梯上，二十个属国的使节浮雕栩栩如生。万国之门与百柱厅的规模彰显着阿契美尼德帝国的荣光，亚历山大大帝的一把火将这座宫殿化为废墟，却无法焚毁石头上的记忆。
pictures.full_text_en: The Nineveh site in Iraq yielded over 20,000 tablets from the Library of Ashurbanipal, covering literature, medicine, and astrology. Lion hunt reliefs are vividly lifelike, and lamassu human-headed bull statues guard the palace gates. The Assyrian Empire's cruelty and civilization coexist in these archaeological discoveries.

pictures.title: 复活节岛考古
pictures.summary: 复活节岛的采石场拉诺拉拉库中，近四百尊未完工的摩艾石像散落各...
pictures.full_text: 复活节岛的采石场拉诺拉拉库中，近四百尊未完工的摩艾石像散落各处。考古发现石像的运输依靠摇曳行走法，岛上的森林砍伐导致生态崩溃，拉帕努伊文明的兴衰是人类与自然关系的警世寓言。
pictures.full_text_en: The Susa site in Iran was the capital of Elamite civilization, continuing from the 4th millennium BC to the Islamic era. Glazed brick reliefs in the winter palace depict archer formations, and the Code of Hammurabi stele was discovered here. Susa spans 5,000 years of layered civilizations and is one of the most important archaeological sites on the Iranian plateau.

pictures.title: 吴哥遗迹群
pictures.summary: 柬埔寨吴哥遗迹群包含百余座寺庙，巴戎寺的四面佛微笑神秘安详。...
pictures.full_text: 柬埔寨吴哥遗迹群包含百余座寺庙，巴戎寺的四面佛微笑神秘安详。激光雷达扫描揭示了隐藏在丛林中的城市道路与运河网络，吴哥城面积达一千平方公里，是工业革命前世界上最大的城市。
pictures.full_text_en: In the Rano Raraku quarry on Easter Island, nearly 400 unfinished moai statues are scattered about. Archaeology reveals that the statues were transported using a rocking-walking method, and deforestation on the island led to ecological collapse. The rise and fall of Rapa Nui civilization is a cautionary fable about the relationship between humanity and nature.

pictures.title: 奥尔梅克巨石头像
pictures.summary: 墨西哥湾沿岸的奥尔梅克遗址出土了巨大的玄武岩人头雕像，高逾三...
pictures.full_text: 墨西哥湾沿岸的奥尔梅克遗址出土了巨大的玄武岩人头雕像，高逾三米重达五十吨。头像戴着头盔状帽子，面容具有非洲人特征，石料从百里外运来，奥尔梅克是中美洲文明之母。
pictures.full_text_en: The Angkor complex in Cambodia contains over a hundred temples, with the four-faced Buddha of Bayon smiling mysteriously and serenely. LiDAR scanning has revealed urban roads and canal networks hidden in the jungle. Angkor city covered 1,000 square kilometers, making it the world's largest city before the Industrial Revolution.

pictures.title: 昌昌古城
pictures.summary: 秘鲁昌昌是奇穆帝国的首都，世界上最大的土砖城市。宫殿围墙上的...
pictures.full_text: 秘鲁昌昌是奇穆帝国的首都，世界上最大的土砖城市。宫殿围墙上的浮雕描绘着渔网与海鸟，灌溉系统精巧完备，储水池至今仍能蓄水。奇穆文明被印加征服后，昌昌逐渐被沙漠吞噬。
pictures.full_text_en: Monte Albán in Oaxaca, Mexico, was the capital of Zapotec civilization, with the hilltop plaza artificially leveled. Dancer reliefs depict sacrificed war captives, and the astronomical observatory precisely aligns with stellar movements. Monte Albán ruled from the mountaintop for a millennium and is the earliest mountaintop city in Mesoamerica.

pictures.title: 阿尔塔米拉洞穴
pictures.summary: 西班牙阿尔塔米拉洞穴顶部绘有十余头野牛，赭红色身躯与黑色轮廓...
pictures.full_text: 西班牙阿尔塔米拉洞穴顶部绘有十余头野牛，赭红色身躯与黑色轮廓线条奔放。这些一万五千年前的壁画最初被发现时被质疑为伪造，后经碳十四测年证实确为旧石器时代杰作，是史前艺术的巅峰。
pictures.full_text_en: In the Viking ship burials unearthed at Oseberg and Gokstad in Norway, chieftains were laid in oak ships, accompanied by weapons and horses. Dragon-head carvings on the prows are imposing, and the hull structures are ingeniously crafted. Viking shipbuilding and navigation technology enabled them to dominate the North Atlantic for 300 years.

pictures.title: 拉斯科洞穴
pictures.summary: 法国拉斯科洞穴壁画绘制于一万七千年前，奔马与野牛群在岩壁上奔...
pictures.full_text: 法国拉斯科洞穴壁画绘制于一万七千年前，奔马与野牛群在岩壁上奔腾。矿物颜料调出红黄黑三色，线条流畅如一气呵成。洞穴因霉菌侵蚀已对公众关闭，数字技术让虚拟参观成为可能。
pictures.full_text_en: The ceiling of Altamira Cave in Spain features over a dozen bison, with ochre-red bodies and bold black contour lines. When first discovered, these 15,000-year-old paintings were suspected of being forgeries, but carbon-14 dating later confirmed them as authentic Paleolithic masterpieces—the pinnacle of prehistoric art.

pictures.title: 加泰土丘
pictures.summary: 土耳其加泰土丘是九千年前的新石器时代大型聚落，房屋紧密相连通...
pictures.full_text: 土耳其加泰土丘是九千年前的新石器时代大型聚落，房屋紧密相连通过屋顶出入。墙壁上绘有猎牛与火山喷发的壁画，黑曜石贸易让这里成为富裕的城镇，死者被安葬于居室之下陪伴生者。
pictures.full_text_en: Göbekli Tepe in Turkey dates back 12,000 years and is the oldest known large-scale stone construction. T-shaped pillars are carved with fox and snake motifs, and the builders may have been hunter-gatherers who had not yet settled. This ritual complex predates the agricultural revolution, overturning theories about the origins of civilization.

pictures.title: 碳十四测年法
pictures.summary: 利比发明的碳十四测年法利用有机物中碳十四的衰变测定年代，将考...
pictures.full_text: 利比发明的碳十四测年法利用有机物中碳十四的衰变测定年代，将考古学从相对年代推进到绝对年代。加速器质谱法将所需样品量降至毫克级，碳十四测年成为考古学最基础的工具之一。
pictures.full_text_en: Çatalhöyük in Turkey is a large Neolithic settlement from 9,000 years ago, with houses packed tightly together and accessed through rooftops. Walls feature murals of bull hunts and volcanic eruptions, and obsidian trade made this a prosperous town. The dead were buried beneath the living quarters, keeping the deceased close to the living.

pictures.title: 遥感考古技术
pictures.summary: 卫星与无人机搭载的多光谱传感器能穿透地表发现地下遗址。激光雷...
pictures.full_text: 卫星与无人机搭载的多光谱传感器能穿透地表发现地下遗址。激光雷达LiDAR在柬埔寨丛林中发现了隐藏的吴哥城外围结构，在伯利兹雨林中揭示了玛雅城市的规模，天空之眼让考古学插上了翅膀。
pictures.full_text_en: In 1949, Libby invented the carbon-14 dating method, using the decay of carbon-14 in organic materials to determine age. This method advanced archaeology from relative to absolute dating, with errors controllable within decades. Libby received the Nobel Prize in Chemistry for this work.

pictures.title: 三维扫描与数字重建
pictures.summary: 三维激光扫描为文物建立毫米级精度的数字模型，虚拟现实技术让消...
pictures.full_text: 三维激光扫描为文物建立毫米级精度的数字模型，虚拟现实技术让消失的建筑在屏幕上重现。巴黎圣母院火灾前的扫描数据成为修复依据，数字考古让文化遗产在虚拟世界中获得永生。
pictures.full_text_en: Ancient DNA technology extracts genetic information from bones, revealing the history of human migration and evolution. Gene flow between Neanderthals and Homo sapiens, the Asian origins of Native Americans, and genetic differences between northern and southern Chinese populations—DNA provides archaeology with an entirely new research dimension.

pictures.title: 地质雷达探测
pictures.summary: 地质雷达向地下发射电磁波，根据反射信号绘制地下结构图像。考古...
pictures.full_text: 地质雷达向地下发射电磁波，根据反射信号绘制地下结构图像。考古学家用GPR在不发掘的情况下探明墓葬与建筑的位置，秦始皇陵地宫的探测就是GPR技术的成功应用，无损探测是考古学的未来方向。
pictures.full_text_en: Trees grow one ring per year, with width recording that year's climate conditions. Douglas discovered that tree-ring sequences can be cross-dated, and dendrochronology achieves dating precision down to the exact year. The longest tree-ring sequence has been extended back 14,000 years, providing a high-precision absolute dating scale for archaeology and climatology.

pictures.title: 孢粉分析
pictures.summary: 湖底沉积物中的花粉孢子记录了古代植被的变迁，孢粉分析重建了千...
pictures.full_text: 湖底沉积物中的花粉孢子记录了古代植被的变迁，孢粉分析重建了千年来的气候与生态环境。农业起源时谷物花粉的激增、森林砍伐后杂草花粉的蔓延，孢粉是自然写下的编年史。
pictures.full_text_en: Ancient DNA technology extracts genetic information from bones, revealing the history of human migration and evolution. Gene flow between Neanderthals and Homo sapiens, the Asian origins of Native Americans, and genetic differences between northern and southern Chinese populations—DNA provides archaeology with an entirely new research dimension.

pictures.title: 热释光测年
pictures.summary: 陶瓷在烧制时释放了矿物中积存的辐射能量，此后重新积累的能量与...
pictures.full_text: 陶瓷在烧制时释放了矿物中积存的辐射能量，此后重新积累的能量与埋藏时间成正比。热释光测年法可直接测定陶器的烧制年代，误差约百分之五至十，是鉴定陶瓷真伪与断代的重要手段。
pictures.full_text_en: 3D laser scanning creates digital models of artifacts with millimeter precision, and virtual reality technology allows vanished buildings to reappear on screen. Pre-fire scan data of Notre-Dame de Paris became the basis for restoration, and digital archaeology grants cultural heritage immortality in the virtual world.

pictures.title: 考古GIS系统
pictures.summary: 地理信息系统将遗址位置、地形地貌与文物数据整合在数字地图上，...
pictures.full_text: 地理信息系统将遗址位置、地形地貌与文物数据整合在数字地图上，空间分析揭示聚落分布规律。流域内遗址的兴衰与水系变迁的关系、墓葬群的社会等级空间分化，GIS让考古学从点扩展到面。
pictures.full_text_en: Strontium isotope analysis can determine ancient migration patterns, oxygen isotopes reveal paleoclimate changes, and carbon-nitrogen isotopes reflect ancient dietary structures. Through isotope analysis of teeth and bones, archaeologists reconstruct individual life histories. Scientific methods make bones speak their own stories.

pictures.title: 水下机器人考古
pictures.summary: 深海水下机器人携带高清摄像头与机械臂潜入海底，在千米深处发现...
pictures.full_text: 深海水下机器人携带高清摄像头与机械臂潜入海底，在千米深处发现古代沉船。黑海中发现的二千四百年前古希腊商船保存完好如初，深水考古开辟了水下考古学的新疆域，海底的历史宝库等待开启。
pictures.full_text_en: Ground-penetrating radar transmits electromagnetic waves into the ground and maps underground structures based on reflected signals. Archaeologists use GPR to locate tombs and buildings without excavation. The survey of Qin Shi Huang's underground palace is a successful application of GPR technology. Non-invasive detection is the future direction of archaeology.

pictures.title: 实验考古学
pictures.summary: 考古学家亲手复制石器、烧制陶器与建造房屋，通过实践验证对古代...
pictures.full_text: 考古学家亲手复制石器、烧制陶器与建造房屋，通过实践验证对古代技术的假说。用石斧砍伐树木需要多长时间？用原始方法能搬运多重的巨石？实验考古让理论落地，从实践中理解古人的智慧与局限。
pictures.full_text_en: Pollen and spores in lake sediments record changes in ancient vegetation, and pollen analysis reconstructs climate and ecological environments over millennia. The surge in cereal pollen at the origins of agriculture, the spread of weed pollen after deforestation—pollen is a chronicle written by nature.

pictures.title: 公众考古学
pictures.summary: 考古工地向公众开放参观，志愿者参与发掘与文物修复。博物馆用互...
pictures.full_text: 考古工地向公众开放参观，志愿者参与发掘与文物修复。博物馆用互动展览讲述考古故事，社交媒体直播发掘过程，公众考古学拉近了专业与大众的距离，让文化遗产保护成为全民的事业。
pictures.full_text_en: Ceramics release stored radiation energy in minerals when fired, and the energy reaccumulated afterward is proportional to burial time. Thermoluminescence dating can directly determine the firing date of pottery, with an error of approximately 5-10%. It is an important method for authenticating and dating ceramics.

pictures.title: 良渚古城发掘
pictures.summary: 浙江良渚古城遗址的发掘证实了五千年中华文明的存在，水利系统规...
pictures.full_text: 浙江良渚古城遗址的发掘证实了五千年中华文明的存在，水利系统规模宏大，玉琮玉璧制作精美。莫角山宫殿基址面积达三十万平方米，反山王陵出土的玉器数量惊人，良渚是东亚最早的国家社会之一。
pictures.full_text_en: Geographic Information Systems integrate site locations, topography, and artifact data on digital maps, with spatial analysis revealing settlement distribution patterns. The relationship between the rise and fall of sites within a river basin and changes in water systems, the spatial differentiation of social hierarchy in cemetery groups—GIS expands archaeology from points to surfaces.

pictures.title: 二里头遗址
pictures.summary: 河南偃师二里头遗址被认为是夏朝晚期都城，宫殿基址的发现表明这...
pictures.full_text: 河南偃师二里头遗址被认为是夏朝晚期都城，宫殿基址的发现表明这里已有成熟的国家形态。绿松石龙形器精美绝伦，铜牌饰上的兽面纹可能是商周饕餮纹的源头。夏文化的探索仍在继续。
pictures.full_text_en: Deep-sea underwater robots carrying high-definition cameras and robotic arms dive to the seabed, discovering ancient shipwrecks at depths of thousands of meters. A 2,400-year-old ancient Greek merchant ship found in the Black Sea was perfectly preserved. Deep-water archaeology opens a new frontier for underwater archaeology, and the historical treasure house on the seabed awaits discovery.

pictures.title: 石峁遗址
pictures.summary: 陕西石峁古城距今四千余年，城墙用石块砌筑面积达四百万平方米。...
pictures.full_text: 陕西石峁古城距今四千余年，城墙用石块砌筑面积达四百万平方米。城墙上镶嵌着精美的石雕人面像，玉器被插入墙体作为宗教仪式。这座超大型史前城址改写了对早期国家形成的认知。
pictures.full_text_en: Ancient proteins extracted from residues on pottery interiors can identify whether vessels once held dairy products or meat. Analysis of bone collagen reveals ancient diets and diseases. Proteomics provides archaeology with molecular-level information beyond DNA—the microscopic world contains macroscopic history.

pictures.title: 陶寺遗址
pictures.summary: 山西襄汾陶寺遗址发现了中国最早的天文观象台，古人通过观测日出...
pictures.full_text: 山西襄汾陶寺遗址发现了中国最早的天文观象台，古人通过观测日出方位确定节气。彩绘龙盘上的蟠龙纹可能是中国龙形象的源头，铜铃和朱书文字的发现将中国文字史向前推进。
pictures.full_text_en: Archaeologists personally replicate stone tools, fire pottery, and build houses, testing hypotheses about ancient technology through practice. How long does it take to fell a tree with a stone axe? How heavy a megalith can be moved using primitive methods? Experimental archaeology grounds theory in practice, understanding ancient wisdom and limitations through hands-on experience.

pictures.title: 三星堆发掘
pictures.summary: 四川广汉三星堆出土的青铜纵目面具和金杖颠覆了人们对古蜀文明的...
pictures.full_text: 四川广汉三星堆出土的青铜纵目面具和金杖颠覆了人们对古蜀文明的认知。高达三米的青铜神树、奇异的青铜人头像，这些前所未见的文物表明古蜀文明有着独立于中原的独特文化体系。
pictures.full_text_en: Archaeological sites are opened for public visits, and volunteers participate in excavations and artifact restoration. Museums use interactive exhibitions to tell archaeological stories, and social media livestreams excavation processes. Public archaeology bridges the gap between professionals and the public, making cultural heritage conservation a cause for all citizens.
